phase.title: Bootstrap
phase.goal: Define scope [CANCELLED 2026-04-30: Bootstrap was completed via parent monorepo task global/65-01 (submodule add + workspace.yaml + research extraction)]

phase.title: Foundation
phase.goal: Stand up the Next.js + shadcn + Tailwind + VCS scaffold so all later phases ship UI into a working site.

phase.title: Home (Brand)
phase.goal: Story-led home page that mirrors the 2sranch.com aesthetic and makes UPAEC's differentiators legible in the first scroll.

phase.title: /boxes Catalog
phase.goal: Render the full box catalog with the 27 product photos and the Order Extra add-on section.

phase.title: Order Flow
phase.goal: Wire up Square Customer + Order + Payments end-to-end with confirmation and webhook reconciliation.

phase.title: Lead Capture / Contact
phase.goal: Capture pre-launch leads and ongoing inquiries via Square Customer creation; protect forms from bots.

phase.title: Launch
phase.goal: Production deploy with custom domain, env management, analytics, and a real sandbox-to-prod smoke before flipping live.

phase.title: Online Store MVP
phase.goal: Full e-commerce purchase path: box-size selector, add-on items, delivery/pickup toggle, subscription AND one-time purchase, mobile-first checkout — backed by Payload CMS product catalog.

phase.title: Delivery Routing + Notifications
phase.goal: ZIP-code service checker on homepage; DeliveryZone rules showing delivery day + cutoff time; pickup scheduling; automated order-confirmation and day-before reminder emails and SMS via Twilio + Resend/SendGrid.

phase.title: Partner Marketplace
phase.goal: Enable 2S Ranch + Southern Sunny Acres (and future partners) to co-sell UPAEC produce embedded on their own sites via Shopify Buy Button / Storefront API; centralized inventory + order management across all channels.

phase.title: Farm Events + Community
phase.goal: Event calendar with registration, blog/news posts, photo galleries, and newsletter signup — all admin-manageable via Payload CMS.

phase.title: UPAEC commerce + content: products/listings/store + image categorization
phase.goal: Make the UPAEC site actually functional (currently scaffolding: home + /boxes routes only, NO products/listings/cart/checkout). Build the online store pulling products + listings (per the requirements: box sizes, add-ons, subscription + one-time, delivery/pickup), wire the categorized landing images (D-417) into section copy, and progress the ZIP checker / events per the roadmap (phases 07-10). Vision-categorize the 32 images first so the landing can pull by category.
